name: --resource-name
--name
-n
options.description: The name of the resource. It must be a minimum of 3 characters, and a maximum of 63

name: --resource-group
-g
options.description: Name of resource group. You can configure the default group using az configure --defaults group=<name>

name: --location
-l
options.description: Location of the resource

options.name: --no-wait
options.description: Do not wait for the long-running operation to finish

options.name: --purpose
options.description: The purpose of the dnc controller resource

options.name: --tags
options.description: The resource tags. Support shorthand-syntax, json-file and yaml-file. Try "??" to show more

options.name: --ids
options.description: One or more resource IDs (space-delimited). It should be a complete resource ID containing all information of 'Resource Id' arguments. You should provide either --ids or other 'Resource Id' arguments

subcommands.name: wait
subcommands.description: Place the CLI in a waiting state until a condition is met

options.name: --created
options.description: Wait until created with 'provisioningState' at 'Succeeded'

options.name: --custom
options.description: Wait until the condition satisfies a custom JMESPath query. E.g. provisioningState!='InProgress', instanceView.statuses[?code=='PowerState/running']

options.name: --deleted
options.description: Wait until deleted

options.name: --exists
options.description: Wait until the resource exists

options.name: --interval
options.description: Polling interval in seconds

subcommands.name: orchestrator-instance-service
subcommands.description: Manage orchestrator instance service with dnc

name: --resource-name
--name
-n
options.description: The name of the resource. It must be a minimum of 3 characters, and a maximum of 63

name: --resource-group
-g
options.description: Name of resource group. You can configure the default group using az configure --defaults group=<name>

options.name: --api-server-endpoint
options.description: K8s APIServer url. Either one of apiServerEndpoint or privateLinkResourceId can be specified

options.name: --cluster-root-ca
options.description: RootCA certificate of kubernetes cluster base64 encoded

options.name: --id
options.description: Controller arm resource id

options.name: --kind
options.description: The kind of workbook. Choices are user and shared

name: --location
-l
options.description: Location of the resource

options.name: --no-wait
options.description: Do not wait for the long-running operation to finish

options.name: --orchestrator-app-id
options.description: AAD ID used with apiserver

options.name: --orchestrator-tenant-id
options.description: TenantID of server App ID

options.name: --priv-link-resource-id
options.description: Private link arm resource id. Either one of apiServerEndpoint or privateLinkResourceId can be specified

options.name: --tags
options.description: The resource tags. Support shorthand-syntax, json-file and yaml-file. Try "??" to show more

options.name: --type
options.description: The type of identity used for orchestrator cluster. Type 'SystemAssigned' will use an implicitly created identity orchestrator clusters
